Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to infer activities from the sensor data

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The event log is for a single machine M1 across a time period from 080000 to 080110 with 15 events at 5 second intervals

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Events 1 to 3 low temperature pressure 1 vibration 0 material flow 0 tool position 0 low energy this appears to be idle or standby state

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Events 4 to 6 temperature rises pressure rises vibration rises material flow 5 tool position increases energy 2 to 3 this suggests an active operation

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Events 7 to 8 temperature drops to 40 pressure 2 vibration 10 material flow 2 tool position 15 energy 2 could be a different phase

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Event 9 temperature spikes to 80 vibration 50 material flow 0 energy 5 a high energy spike with high temperature and vibration but no material flow

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Events 11 to 12 slight vibration low material flow tool position changed to 20 could be a finishing or inspection phase

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The machine seems to go through a cycle idle then a heating active phase then a moderate phase then a high temperature spike then cooldown then a light activity then idle

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Cutting would involve high vibration temperature increase due to friction coolant flow and energy consumption this matches events 4 to 6

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Assembling might involve applying pressure to fit parts together temperature moderately elevated vibration lower tool position steady this matches events 7 to 8

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Welding high temperature high vibration no material flow high energy this matches event 9

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Quality Inspection slight vibration low material flow tool movement moderate energy these signatures are typical of an automated inspection step

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The inferred process is Idle Cutting Assembling Welding Cooling Quality Inspection Idle
